name_cn:
Genuine Grade
🌟Small Sheepskin 3-in-1
This 3-in-1 bag with lining is crafted from soft lambskin, creating a minimalist silhouette. It features a detachable nylon shoulder strap and a chain strap. The favorite part is the small bag hanging on the strap. The texture is exceptionally soft, making it both practical and casual!
Size: 22L x 18H x 6.5W cm
Style: 1BH204
